---
title: "Step 5. Standardize Condition indicators"
format: html
---

Following the equation for Step 3 (below), each standardized condition value was calculated and can be found in [Table 12](#table12).

$$SI_0 = \frac{I_0}{RV}$$

Where:

- $SI_0$ = Standardized Condition Indicator at project start

- $I_0$ = Condition indicator value at project start

- $RV$ = Reference value

<br>

Species richness of herpetofauna: $$ 
    SI_{0,\text{herp}} = \frac{46}{90} = 0.511
    $$

Species richness of birds: $$SI_{0,\text{birds}} = \frac{215}{230} = 0.935$$

Species richness of mammals: $$SI_{0,\text{mammals}} = \frac{31}{46} = 0.674$$

Aboveground biomass: $$SI_{0,\text{AGB}} = \frac{152.051}{187.234} = 0.812$$

Forest canopy cover: $$SI_{0,\text{canopy}} = \frac{60}{72} = 0.833$$

<details>

<summary>Table 12. Standardized Condition Indicators</summary>

::: {#table12}
:::

::: terra-table-title
Table 12. Standardized Condition Indicators
:::

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(DT)

table_data <- data.frame(
  check.names = FALSE,
  
  `Condition Component` = c(
    "Composition (Cm1)",
    "Composition (Cm2)",
    "Composition (Cm3)",
    "Structure (S1)",
    "Structure (S2)"
  ),
  
  `Indicator Description` = c(
    "Species richness of herpetofauna",
    "Species richness of birds",
    "Species richness of mammals",
    "Aboveground biomass (MG DM ha-1)",
    "Forest canopy cover (%)"
  ),
  
  `Reference Value` = c(
    "90.000",
    "230.000",
    "46.000",
    "48.860",
    "66.280"
  ),
  
  `Condition value measured at project start` = c(
    "46.000",
    "215.000",
    "31.000",
    "34.540",
    "49.050"
  ),
  
  `Standardized Condition value` = c(
    "0.511",
    "0.935",
    "0.674",
    "0.707",
    "0.740"
  )
)

datatable(
  table_data,
  options = list(
    paging = FALSE,
    searching = FALSE,
    info = FALSE,
    ordering = FALSE,
    scrollX = TRUE,
    autoWidth = FALSE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all")
    )
  ),
  rownames = FALSE,
  class = "stripe hover compact"
)
```

</details>
